title: ParseError line==0 sentinel not noted at error sites
description: parse_error.rs documents that line==0 means no position is available (form layer). But the error construction sites in form.rs all use line: 0, col: 0 with no comment explaining this is intentional. A maintainer adding a new error in form.rs might not realize this is the convention rather than a bug. One brief comment at the first such site (or a module-level note in form.rs) would make it clear.
